Component Library

Interactive Systems

A curated collection of cinematic, interactive components. Each module is self-contained, mouse-reactive, and built for high-fidelity visual storytelling.

01

Holographic Cards

4D Phase System

Venture-ready AI assets projected from 4-dimensional phase space. Hover to shift dimensions. Each card exists at a unique phase angle along the W-axis.

CSS 3DFramer MotionPhase Shift

Agents

Multi-agent system that coordinates autonomous AI workers across complex enterprise workflows.

Nodes

Domains

SearchOS

Enterprise Search Platform

Impressions

02

Autonomous Core

Three.js Scene

A self-organizing neural substrate rendered in real-time WebGL. Floating mechanical icosahedron with orbiting rings, satellite nodes, and volumetric light beams.

React Three FiberWebGLThree.js
cinematic-3d

[ Neural Architecture ]

Autonomous Core

A self-organizing neural substrate. Click the floating panels to navigate. Move your cursor to interact.

03

Cinematic Transformer

Metamorphic Engine

Eight neural subsystems dynamically reconfigure between vehicle and autonomous mech formations using spring physics and 3D CSS perspective transforms.

Framer MotionCSS 3DSpring Physics

Autonomous Transformer

Eight neural subsystems dynamically reconfigure between vehicle and autonomous mech formations. Hover to inspect. Click to initiate metamorphosis.

System Assembly

Platform Scene
